displayNameZh: 不要担心手动，先解决问题赚到钱再自动化
summary: Yt Manual First component for Remotion.
summaryZh: 适用于 Remotion 的「不要担心手动，先解决问题赚到钱再自动化」组件。

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/yt-manual-first/src/YtManualFirst.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `YtManualFirst` and `ytManualFirstDefaultProps`, then register the composition.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Yt Manual First Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/yt-manual-first to my project. Preserve the exported YtManualFirstProps API and register the YtManualFirst composition with the default props.
